news-global-econ.title: Belgium PM De Wever: E.U. Leaders Afraid of China, Must Fight Unfair Trade
news-global-econ.description: Belgium's Prime Minister Bart De Wever on Tuesday urged European leaders to come together and develop a strategy to counter China's economic domination plans — noting "we are so afraid that we don't even dare" to name Beijing's unfair trading practices for wh…

news-global-econ.title: Could the next Chinese threat walk into your kitchen on two battery-powered legs?
news-global-econ.description: Humanoid robots could be in every American home within a decade. Experts warn the U.S. must win the robotics race against China for national security.

news-global-econ.title: Here's why universal basic income would be a disaster for America’s future
news-global-econ.description: As AI transforms the economy, some tech leaders push universal basic income. This piece argues Americans need opportunity, not government checks.

news-global-econ.title: SEN KEVIN CRAMER: China builds for war while America waits on permits
news-global-econ.description: Permitting reform is essential to rebuild America's defense industrial base and deter conflict with China, which outproduces the U.S. in key areas.

news-global-econ.title: Google’s backstops underpin $35 billion chip deal for Anthropic
news-global-econ.description: Google, whose AI entries include Gemini, agreed to backstop lease payments at each location, helping Anthropic obtain what amounts to a $35 billion loan.
